fields.label: Source DocType
fields.description: DocType whose submitted records drive changes to the carrier balance.

fields.label: Amount Field
fields.description: Numeric field on the source DocType (or its child table) whose value is the transaction amount.

fields.label: Child Table Field
fields.description: If the amount lives on a child table row, pick the table field here.

fields.label: Direction
fields.description: Whether submissions of this source add to or deduct from the carrier balance.

fields.label: Carrier Link Field
fields.description: Link field on the source DocType that points to the Balance Carrier DocType.

fields.label: Posting Date Field
fields.description: Date or Datetime field on the source DocType that sets the posting date.

fields.label: Posting Time Field
fields.description: Optional Time field. Only useful when Posting Date Field is a Date (not Datetime).
